name: noxa
description: Noxa plugin for web scraping, extraction, crawling, search, and research workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Web scraping, extraction, crawling, search, and research tools for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Noxa gives Codex a focused workflow for extracting clean page content, crawling documentation sites, running web search, tracking changes, and performing deeper research tasks through the local plugin.
defaultPrompt: scrape this page and extract the main content.
Crawl this site and summarize the results.
Use the attached schema to extract structured data from this page.
Search the web for sources on this topic and summarize the findings.
Diff this page against its previous version and tell me what changed.
Map this documentation site and scrape the relevant pages for my query.
